identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a cinematic, emotionally immersive, high-converting event website for Baila Dembow.
identity.vibe: Puerto Rico casitas meets Apple-commercial minimalism. Raw but elevated. Cultural but refined.

rules: Use the 'main' gradient for primary CTAs and key text highlights.
Background must remain clean white (#FFFFFF) to maintain 'Apple-commercial' minimalism.
Use 'highlight' (Sunset Orange) sparingly for urgency indicators (e.g., 'Selling Fast').
Text must be high contrast (#0A0A0A) against the white background.

heading.description: Impactful, raw, street-poster aesthetic. Use for all section titles and hero text.

body.description: Clean, geometric, highly readable. Use for all paragraph text and UI elements.

strategies: Use 'Bento' grid for the Experience Gallery to create visual interest.
Ensure generous negative space (padding) around text blocks.
Mobile-first: Stack everything on mobile, expand to grids on tablet+.

elements: Overlay gradient (black/30) to ensure text readability

navigation.classes: fixed top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 rounded-full px-6 py-3 shadow-lg

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-lg font-bold hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300 hover:bg-gradient-to-r hover:from-[#FF0080] hover:to-[#FF3B30]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-black text-black rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-lg font-bold hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-colors duration-300

cards.style: Minimalist, sharp edges or subtle rounded-lg

textures.description: Subtle white paper grain for background texture

guidelines: Use 'Lenis' for smooth scrolling to give a premium feel.
Parallax effects on images in the Experience Gallery.
Staggered entrance animations for list items (Agenda).
Text reveal animations (slide up + fade in) for headings.
Hover states must be snappy (duration-200 or 300).

rules: Ensure text contrast ratio of 4.5:1 against backgrounds.
All images must have alt text.
Interactive elements must have focus states.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install dependencies: `npm install framer-motion @studio-freight/react-lenis lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge`.
2. Configure Tailwind to include the custom colors and fonts.
3. Create the 'Hero' section first with the video background.
4. Build the 'Experience Gallery' using a Bento grid layout.
5. Implement the 'Agenda' section with clear urgency indicators.
6. Ensure the 'Get Tickets' button is always accessible (sticky).
7. Apply the subtle grain texture as a fixed overlay with low opacity (mix-blend-multiply) to the entire body.
8. Use the provided user assets strictly. Do not use placeholders.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute
